response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years of breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud — well exceeding the 6-year minimum. His current role at re:cinq directly aligns with the position: TypeScript/Node.js product work, AI-agent infrastructure, and MCP framework development. Strong demonstrated experience with MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes, React, and a consistent TDD/craftsmanship practice across multiple employers. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python references on the resume, which introduce some uncertainty around fit with the exact stack but are not disqualifying given the depth of adjacent experience.
strengths: Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq directly matches the job's AI agent development requirement
15+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js with proven cloud (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and NoSQL (MongoDB) experience
Consistent craftsmanship culture — TDD, trunk-based development, code reviews, and workshop facilitation across multiple senior/staff roles
concerns: No explicit NestJS experience mentioned anywhere on the resume despite it being the primary backend framework in the job's stack
Kotlin is absent from both the skills list and employment history, and Python is also missing — both are listed as required proficiencies
Testing tools cited (DLang Fluent-Asserts, Trial runner) are ecosystem-specific; no mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright to validate required testing framework expertise
